columns.name: 510k_number
columns.description: FDA-assigned identifier for the submission (format: 'K' followed by six digits, e.g., K143467).

columns.name: applicant
columns.description: Submitter/manufacturer responsible for the 510(k) (e.g., TaiDoc Technology Corporation).

columns.name: classification
columns.description: Regulatory device class under the cited regulation (e.g., Class II).

columns.name: conclusion
columns.description: Decision language indicating the submission supports a substantial equivalence (SE) determination.

columns.name: indications_for_use
columns.description: Formal statement describing who uses the device, what it measures, specimen types/sites, and key limitations/contraindications (e.g., not for diagnosis/screening or neonates; AST only during steady state).

columns.name: intended_use
columns.description: General purpose statement for the device; often defers to the formal Indications for Use section for specifics and limitations.

columns.name: measurand
columns.description: Analyte and specimen type(s) measured by the device (e.g., glucose in fresh capillary whole blood from fingertip, palm, forearm, upper arm).

columns.name: panel
columns.description: FDA review panel/medical specialty and code number responsible for the device (e.g., Clinical Chemistry (75)).

columns.name: predicate_510k_number
columns.description: FDA identifier for the predicate device’s cleared submission (e.g., K101509).

columns.name: predicate_device_name
columns.description: Commercial name of the legally marketed predicate device used to establish substantial equivalence.

columns.name: product_code
columns.description: FDA product code(s) that categorize the device; may include multiple codes (e.g., NBW, LFR).

columns.name: proposed_labeling
columns.description: Summary of labeling adequacy and compliance with FDA requirements (e.g., 21 CFR 809.10), including necessary user instructions such as QC and cleaning/disinfection if applicable.

columns.name: proprietary_and_established_names
columns.description: Proprietary/established marketing name(s) for the device (e.g., FORA GD43 Blood Glucose Monitoring System).

columns.name: purpose_for_submission
columns.description: High-level reason for the 510(k) (e.g., new device, modification, new indication, labeling change).

columns.name: regulation_section
columns.description: Cited CFR section defining the device type (e.g., 21 CFR 862.1345, Glucose test system).

columns.name: type_of_test
columns.description: Analytical method and detection principle, including enzyme system if applicable (e.g., GDH-FAD quantitative amperometric assay).
